visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a split-screen montage. On the left, a woman eats a large piece of orange food with a gloved hand; on the right, the main creator, a woman with dark hair, reacts with wide eyes while holding a beverage can. Bright studio-style lighting illuminates her face. (2) The scene shifts to the creator sitting in an indoor room, holding a white styrofoam shipping box labeled with Korean text. She opens it to reveal an orange-pink, liver-like object wrapped in clear plastic. (3) She places the raw liver onto a white paper towel on a wooden table, using more towels to gently dab the surface. Her hands are visible, showing focus as she handles the delicate food item. (4) A large white plate of thinly sliced, translucent pink raw fish (sashimi) is presented alongside the liver. The background includes a neutral-colored couch and home decor items. (5) The creator attempts to cut the liver with a small yellow-handled knife. The texture appears very soft and slightly sticky, almost like a thick paste. She has an expression of nervous anticipation. (6) Wearing a clear plastic glove, she picks up a small piece of the liver, dips it into a small bowl of salt and sesame seeds, and eats it. Her face immediately contorts in a mix of confusion and awkward laughter, suggesting a complex taste. (7) She continues the review, picking up larger pieces of the orange liver and describing its texture. She shakes her head and looks into the camera with a squinting, slightly repulsed expression while chewing. (8) Transitioning to the sashimi, she uses wooden chopsticks to dip a slice of fish into a red sauce. Her expression shifts to one of genuine enjoyment, smiling as she eats. (9) She returns to the liver, this time drenching it in a red spicy sauce from a bottle. She takes a large bite, and her eyes widen in surprise, appearing to find this combination more palatable. (10) The final scene shows the creator sitting in a more casual setting, wearing a black top. She holds a large bag of snacks and shares the moment with a small white dog sitting on her lap.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 來源出處 틱톡 얌야미. [Slogan]: 韓網爆紅神奇食材 黃金生鴨血? (2) [Slogan]: 黃色鴨血...? (3) [Slogan]: 超多韓國網美 生吃黃色的魚肝?! (4) [Variety]: 實驗歐膩. [Logo]: @HanHan. (5) [Slogan]: +851NT. (6) [Subtitle]: 這個東西叫做. [Variety]: 韓語: 노랑가오리 애. 中文: 黃金魟魚肝. (7) [Variety]: 這幾年超級多韓國網紅都吃這個. (8) [Variety]: 生魚肝. (9) [Subtitle]: 要用廚房紙巾把血水吸掉才可以喔~ (10) [Variety]: 觸感真的很像鴨血. (11) [Variety]: 這個是黃金魟魚生魚片. (12) [Variety]: 感覺好奇怪. (13) [Variety]: 混亂. (14) [Subtitle]: 就是那種把奶油狂塞進酪梨裡的感覺!! (15) [Variety]: 大家敢吃嗎? (16) [Variety]: 當機. (17) [Variety]: 有勇氣吃食物List. (18) [Variety]: 吃看看黃金魟魚生魚片! (19) [Variety]: 超級Q彈有嚼勁 而且有那種鮮甜回甘的味道. (20) [Variety]: 加了奶油辣醬之後好一點耶! (21) [Variety]: (真相). (22) [Variety]: (用餅乾來轉換一下口味).

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 3 other women appearing in brief intro clips.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing various casual tops including a black shirt, sometimes wearing clear plastic gloves for food handling.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A domestic indoor setting featuring a wooden table, a neutral-colored couch, a refrigerator, and a white dog in the final scene.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-energy electronic BGM and a bright female voice speaking rapid Mandarin. A distinct wet crunching sound (munching) is heard, accompanied by a 'whoosh' transition SFX. (2) As the unboxing starts, the BGM continues while the narrator's pitch rises with excitement. The sound of plastic rustling and a styrofoam lid opening is audible. (3) During the food preparation, the narrator's speech rate slows slightly for emphasis. A 'ding' SFX punctuates the reveal of the raw liver. The BGM maintains a steady, upbeat tempo. (4) Sharp, crisp 'munching' and 'slurping' sounds are highlighted as the creator eats. A cartoonish 'pop' sound effect marks a moment of visual surprise. (5) When reacting to the liver's taste, the narrator lets out an awkward, high-pitched laugh, and the BGM volume dips slightly to emphasize her vocal reaction. (6) A 'swish' sound effect occurs as she dips the fish into the sauce. Her voice becomes more melodic and positive, with rising intonations indicating enjoyment. (7) The final segment features the sound of a snack bag being crinkled and the rhythmic crunch of chips being eaten. The BGM fades out with a playful 'stinger' sound effect.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Explanation -> Trial -> Climax -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review and share the experience of eating a trendy and unusual Korean food item, stingray liver, contrasting its intense richness with the more traditional appeal of sashimi.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high density of variety-show style text and sound effects common in East Asian social media content to maintain a high-energy, engaging pace.
